description: Top-level rights/ tree (D4): join container for rights_failure entries — the vendored schemas/rights/rights_failure.schema.json (EPR0-T2) plus its declared local amendment layer (EPR0-T3) is the shape authority for each entry in `failures`. A rights_failure records a blocking or open rights problem (e.g. an unresolved access-basis, an unaddressed contract restriction) and cross-links to an existing project identifier — never a new, agent-invented finding ID. EPR0-T1 creates this container empty; EPR0-T4 populates it, cross-linking known open failures (REG-002, EP3T5-F01, EP3T5-F02) to their existing identifiers. Every rights_failure.review.reviewed_by stays maxItems: 0 (D6) — no reviewer is ever recorded by an agent.

failures.intended_use: Verbatim quoting of AAP/guideline-body text in modules/anemia/evidence.json exactPassage fields
failures.finding: REG-002 (content-rights/licensing review) is an already-tracked, pre-existing review that has not yet been run — it is cross-linked here, not newly invented by this record. It decides whether exactPassage may quote verbatim guideline text or must remain paraphrase-with-locator-only. Until REG-002 clears, every exactPassage sourced from a rights-restricted guideline is withheld with the fixed placeholder "[withheld pending REG-002 content-rights clearance]" (see modules/anemia/evidence.json and schemas/evidence.schema.json). REG-002 is referenced across docs/project_plans/PRDs/infrastructure/wave0-safety-foundation-v1.md (its origin), modules/anemia/evidence.json (its withholding placeholder), and .claude/findings/wave0-ep3-ep4-evidence-governance-findings.md (open-gap R-2).
failures.product_impact: All exactPassage fields sourced from rights-restricted guideline text stay paraphrase-only or withheld; no verbatim guideline quoting ships until REG-002 clears.
failures.next_action: Run REG-002 (content-rights/licensing review) via Research Foundry; see docs/project_plans/PRDs/infrastructure/wave0-safety-foundation-v1.md for scope.
failures.retry_trigger: REG-002 review completes and records a licensing determination

review.notes: Triage cross-link only (EPR0-T4, FR-WP0-05). No new finding is invented here — REG-002 is a pre-existing, already-tracked open review referenced by multiple prior artifacts in this repository.

failures.component: exactPassage text sharing a contiguous span with restricted source text
failures.intended_use: Binding affected passages as source-supported grounding for a rule
failures.finding: Cross-link to the existing EP3-T5 passage-fidelity audit finding EP3T5-F01 (evidence-packs/rf-ev-001/fidelity-findings.json, flag "near-verbatim-span-pending-rights", severity high): passage text reproduces 8-13 contiguous words of restricted source text despite passageFidelity: paraphrase, originating in the RF bundle's own summary field. Affects passages across four KB-cited sources: FDA2026_CDS#ev_002-ev_005, BSH2020_G6PD#ev_002/ev_003/ev_005/ev_007, AAP2026_IDA#ev_005, and CDC2025_LEAD#ev_001/ev_003 — each of those four sources' rights_record in rights/rights-records.json also carries this rights_failure_id. This record does not invent a new finding; it cross-links the pre-existing audit finding into the rights substrate.
safe_residual_use: passage bound only as implementation-proposal, never source-supported, per bindingRule in fidelity-findings.json
failures.product_impact: Affected passages fall back to the implementation-proposal sentinel and must not bind as source-supported grounding for any rule while this finding is open.
failures.next_action: Resolve pending REG-002 content-rights clearance, or re-author the affected passage text to remove the near-verbatim span.
failures.retry_trigger: REG-002 clears for the affected source, or the passage is re-authored and re-audited

review.notes: Triage cross-link only (EPR0-T4, FR-WP0-05). No new finding is invented here — EP3T5-F01 already exists in evidence-packs/rf-ev-001/fidelity-findings.json.

failures.intended_use: Binding AAP2026_IDA-cited passages as source-supported grounding for a rule
failures.finding: Cross-link to the existing EP3-T5 passage-fidelity audit finding EP3T5-F02 (evidence-packs/rf-ev-001/fidelity-findings.json, flag "source-not-independently-retrievable", severity high): the AAP source card provides only a publisher URL with file_path: null plus a self-attestation of full-text access, not a retrievable artifact. RF-EV-002 and REG-002 independently recorded HTTP 403 / subscription-required for this source. Affects AAP2026_IDA#ev_001 through #ev_007. This record does not invent a new finding; it cross-links the pre-existing audit finding into the rights substrate.
failures.product_impact: All 7 AAP2026_IDA passages fall back to the implementation-proposal sentinel; AAP2026_IDA contributes zero bindable source-supported passages while this finding is open.
failures.next_action: Obtain an independently retrievable, rights-cleared AAP artifact and reproducible locators, or re-anchor the affected claims to a rights-clear substitute per RF-EV-003.
failures.retry_trigger: An independently retrievable AAP artifact is located and its rights basis is verified

review.notes: Triage cross-link only (EPR0-T4, FR-WP0-05). No new finding is invented here — EP3T5-F02 already exists in evidence-packs/rf-ev-001/fidelity-findings.json.
